productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Narrow Dial Navy Blue Watches
description: Sleek is in so look all the more elegant with this sleek wrist watch from fastrack. With a convenient leather strap and small dial, it's fashion unparalleled with this strap on!Case diameter: 22 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: RectangleStainless steel case with a black polyurethane strap for enhanced durability and comfort Tang clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckle Fixed resin bezel for added durability Quartz movement of time display to ensure accurate time measurement Scratch resistant mineral crystal to keep your watch safe and well protected for yearsSolid case back for enhanced life Water resistant at 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing hands and in mild rain
